narrative:
Sharon TWP township has 4,994 registered voters, with 51.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.3 percentage points.
